title: Arbel et al - AI A Corps
description: Arbel, Brennan, Sarel & Strahilevitz — The A-Corporation
show_notes:
Arbel, Brennan, Sarel & Strahilevitz — The A-Corporation

Arbel and co-authors propose the 'A-corporation,' a new legal entity designed to hold and manage resources on behalf of AI agents. Drawing on corporate law, agency theory, and AI safety research, the Article argues that existing legal frameworks are ill-suited to govern increasingly autonomous AI systems. A-corps would provide a governance structure enabling AI agents to operate within legal bounds while preserving incentives for alignment, with internal checks modeled on corporate fiduciary duties and resource constraints that naturally limit misaligned behavior.

17:08 I. The Problem of AI Identity
